title: Snowflake Connection Window UI Cleanup
story: As a Salesforce administrator setting up a Snowflake connection, I want the connection window to have clear, properly formatted titles and helpful tutorial links, so that I can follow the setup process without confusion.
description:
Clean up the Snowflake connection window UI with proper title casing and organized content:

**Title:** "Connect to your Snowflake account"

**Accordion labels:**
- "How to generate your Oauth credentials"
- "How to whitelist DataTools Pro IP address"

**Subtitle:** "Configure your Snowflake Oauth credentials:"

**Tutorial links (added to the dialog):**
- Generate Snowflake Client ID and Secret for OAuth
- Snowflake network policy overview
- Using Snowflake as a Source for Data Mapping

All titles follow sentence case (caps only on proper nouns and buttons) rather than title case.
acceptance_criteria: Main title reads 'Connect to your Snowflake account' in sentence case
Accordion 1 label reads 'How to generate your Oauth credentials'
Accordion 2 label reads 'How to whitelist DataTools Pro IP address'
OAuth subtitle reads 'Configure your Snowflake Oauth credentials:'
Three tutorial links are displayed with correct URLs
Tutorial video placeholder is included (video URL pending)
ux_changes: Updated title casing throughout the Snowflake connection window. Added three tutorial links. Reorganized accordion labels and subtitles for clarity.
implementation_notes: Video URL was still pending at time of implementation — currently showing the Tableau video as a placeholder.
comment_summary: Developer deployed the UI changes but noted the tutorial video URL was still missing.
